ford_mustang_job_note_01c7504e48.text: Silca explicitly lists Ford Mustang S550 from 2017 with HU101, 433 MHz and ID47. The UK S550 generation began in 2015, so 2015-2016 vehicles must still be checked against VIN/original key before supply, but the principal UK S550 key family is now mapped.

verification.notes: Duplicate wording is collapsed in this index. Each note remains traceable to the verified generation-specific records in models.json.
